mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM card_transactions c LEFT JOIN ledger_entries l ON l.source_type = 'CARD_TRANSACTION' AND l.source_id = c.id AND l.entry_type = 'CARD_TRANSACTION_POSTED' WHERE c.credit_account_id = #{creditAccountId} AND c.status = 'POSTED' AND c.billing_status = 'UNBILLED' AND c.posted_at >= #{periodStartInclusive} AND c.posted_at < #{periodEndExclusive} AND l.id IS NULL

SELECT c.id AS card_transaction_id, l.id AS ledger_entry_id, c.network_transaction_id, c.authorization_id, c.card_id, c.amount, c.currency, c.posted_at FROM card_transactions c JOIN ledger_entries l ON l.source_type = 'CARD_TRANSACTION' AND l.source_id = c.id AND l.entry_type = 'CARD_TRANSACTION_POSTED' WHERE c.credit_account_id = #{creditAccountId} AND c.status = 'POSTED' AND c.billing_status = 'UNBILLED' AND c.statement_id IS NULL AND c.posted_at >= #{periodStartInclusive} AND c.posted_at < #{periodEndExclusive} ORDER BY c.posted_at, c.id FOR UPDATE
mapper.update:
UPDATE card_transactions SET billing_status = 'BILLED', statement_id = #{statementId}, statement_assigned_at = #{billedAt}, updated_at = #{billedAt} WHERE status = 'POSTED' AND billing_status = 'UNBILLED' AND statement_id IS NULL AND id IN
#{cardTransactionId}
